{{Quote|Don't look, don't look. Act natural. Just tell me what you need. I can help. Happy to help. Risk no object.|Charpp, to Maks Leem|<ref name="DR" />}}
'''Charpp''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Security guard/Legends|security guard]] stationed at the [[Chancellor Palpatine Spaceport]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]. He was a great admirer of the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] and possessed great knowledge about their [[Jedi Order/Legends|Order]].

While heading to the planet [[Vjun/Legends|Vjun]] during a secret [[Mission to Vjun (Clone Wars)|mission]], [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Maks Leem]] was routed to Charpp's [[Security point eleven|station]] for inspection. Using his [[Security scanner/Legends|security scanner]], Charpp recognized her hidden [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]] for what it was, then concluded that Leem was a Jedi and offered her his help on her mission. Leem pretended to know beforehand that Charpp was a Jedi supporter, and that she was intentionally sent to his security line to maintain her cover. Charpp believed the tale and was pleased that he was able to help a Jedi complete a mission.

==Biography==
{{Quote|Most of the guys here wouldn't recognize that sensor signature. Not me. I know what it is. I know what you are. There's a group of us, we trade information, you know, but I never thought I'd actually see....|Charpp, to Maks Leem|<ref name="DR" />}}
A [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]], Charpp worked at the [[Chancellor Palpatine Spaceport]] on the [[The galaxy/Legends|galactic]] [[Capital/Legends|capital]] [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] as a [[Security guard/Legends|security guard]]. During the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] between the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] and the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]], Charpp had a strong fascination in the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] and gathered a great deal of knowledge about its [[Jedi/Legends|members]].<ref name="DR" />

[[File:Coruscant-EotE.jpg|thumb|right|250px|Coruscant, where Charpp resided]]
In [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]],<ref name="Date">''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' dates the events of ''[[Yoda: Dark Rendezvous]]'', in which Charpp meets [[Maks Leem]] appears, to [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]].</ref> Charpp was stationed at [[security point eleven]] of the [[Spaceport/Legends|spaceport]]. He chanced upon [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Maks Leem]], who had lined up for his station. The Jedi Master was at that [[Time/Legends|time]] working undercover for a [[Mission to Vjun (Clone Wars)|mission]], which required passage to the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Vjun/Legends|Vjun]]. Charpp took Leem aside after [[Security scanner/Legends|scanning]] the Jedi and told her that he recognized the unique signature readings of her hidden [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]], thus deducing that Leem was a Jedi.<ref name="DR" />

When Leem confirmed her identity, Charpp became excited at the opportunity of meeting an actual Jedi and readily offered his help on her mission. Faced with an overeager admirer, Leem pretended that the Order knew Charpp was a loyal supporter of the Jedi, and that they specifically chose his security line for her to go through, knowing that he would not blow her cover. Ecstatic that he was able to help the Jedi on her mission, Charpp allowed Leem to go on her way.<ref name="DR" />

==Personality and traits==
{{Quote|People say the Jedi are only out for themselves now. They say they're just the Chancellor's secret police. I never bought that for a second. That's not the Jedi way.|Charpp, to Maks Leem|<ref name="DR" />}}
In 19 BBY, Charpp was middle-aged, with [[Color/Legends|black]] and white-streaked [[Hair/Legends|hair]] that was cut in a military buzz. He had a double chin and tended to sweat a lot. Charpp had a strong admiration for the Jedi Order and strove to know as much as he could about them, to the point of watching the play ''[[Jedi!]]'' at least fifteen times and trading information about the Order with other like-minded individuals. Charpp refused to believe that the Jedi would compromise their ideals to serve as [[Supreme Chancellor/Legends|Chancellor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine's]] secret police. When presented with the opportunity to speak to a real Jedi like Maks Leem, he became highly excited and volunteered his assistance to Leem's mission, going so far as disregarding his own safety and assuring the Jedi that he would do anything to help.<ref name="DR" />

==Behind the scenes==
Charpp is a character created by author [[Sean Stewart]] for the [[2004]] novel ''[[Yoda: Dark Rendezvous]]''.<ref name="DR" />

==Appearances==
